creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Thu, Oct 05, 2006 at 03:41:39PM +0000, Reiko wrote:

> The soundcard, specified at the end, is not detected.
> It would nbe nice, if this will be supported in FreeBSD
> Linux (Ubuntu 6.06) has support for this soundcard. Maybe implementation details can be used from there.
> 
> Thanks in advance,
> Reiko
> 
> 
> pcm0@pci0:27:0: class=0x040300 card=0x01cd1028 chip=0x27d88086 rev=0x01 hdr=0x00
>     vendor   = 'Intel Corporation'
>     device   = '82801G (ICH7 Family) High Definition Audio'
>     class    = multimedia

I think support was just added to 7.0, so if you wait a while it may
appear in 6.x too (unlikely before 6.2 though).

Kris
